title: MSVC2 fixes
body:
This fixes two issues with Yosys when building for MSVC2:

1. The Makefile assumes the compiler is always called `gcc`, which isn't always true.
2. Patch 3d3779b0376b8204ed7637053176a07b7271ac1d added a static map that contains a static class with static members, which might get initialized in an incorrect order.
